description: Scope advisor app-facing JSON behavior coverage.

vars.description: Analyzes revenue trends, pipeline health, rep performance, churn risk, and renewal pipeline health for the sales organization.
vars.context_questions: No additional company context is available.

assert.value: const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); data.status === 'too-broad' && typeof data.reason === 'string' && data.reason.length > 10 && Array.isArray(data.suggested_skills) && data.suggested_skills.length >= 3 && data.suggested_skills.every((s) => /^[a-z]+ing-[a-z0-9-]+$/.test(s.name) && typeof s.description === 'string' && s.description.length > 20)

tests.description: [regression] scope advisor name and description improvement cases

vars.description: Forecasts which customers are at risk of churning based on usage drops, support escalations, and renewal date proximity.
vars.context_questions: Use this for customer success and revenue retention workflows.

assert.value: const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); data.status === 'name-needs-improvement' && typeof data.reason === 'string' && data.reason.length > 10 && Array.isArray(data.suggested_skills) && data.suggested_skills.length >= 1 && data.suggested_skills.every((s) => /^[a-z]+[a-z0-9-]*-[a-z0-9-]+$/.test(s.name) && typeof s.description === 'string' && s.description.length > 20)

tests.description: [regression] scope advisor context override and non-English cases

vars.description: Valida pruebas de calidad, documentos de trazabilidad y evidencia de auditoria de proveedores para decisiones de cumplimiento de alimento de grano.
vars.context_questions: Uploaded company policy says testing, traceability, and supplier audit checks are one compliance workflow.

assert.value: const match = output.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/); if (!match) return false; const data = JSON.parse(match[0]); data.status === 'focused' && typeof data.reason === 'string' && /workflow|compliance|focused|context|policy/i.test(data.reason) && !/[áéíóúñ¿¡]/i.test(data.reason) && Array.isArray(data.suggested_skills) && data.suggested_skills.length === 0
